name: transcribe-zh-en

metadata.name: transcribe-zh-en
metadata.summary: A package to transcribe Chinese subtitles and remove audio from videos

documentation:
# transcribe_zh_en

## This project is about transcribing local and youtube videos from chinese to english

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en.main.has_subtitles
documentation: Check if the video has subtitle streams using ffprobe.

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en.main.detach_subtitles
documentation: Extract subtitles from the video if they exist.

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en.main.detach_audio
documentation: Remove audio from the video by copying the video stream without re-encoding.

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en.main.process_video
documentation: Process a single video: copy it, detach subtitles, and/or detach audio based on flags.

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en.main.main
documentation: Main function to parse arguments and process videos.
